_comment: Illustrative of what assemble(EXEC_BRIEF) emits. In a real PBIP this lives in the <name>.Report/ folder as report.json beside definition.pbir (PBIR format). The exact report.json schema is UNDOCUMENTED and external editing is unsupported during PBIP preview — so treat this as the shape of code-first assembly, validated through Power BI Desktop/Fabric, not a byte-for-byte contract. The point: no visual dragged by hand; every binding is a certified measure; provenance records certified-only assembly. See docs/strategy/pbip-facts.md.
name: Executive Patient Flow
